title: Holy grail serum
text: I love this serum. Used daily for three months and my skin tone evened out noticeably. Switched from Ordinary Vitamin C and this absorbs better. Would buy again.

title: Caused breakout
text: I used this for a week and broke out terribly. Returned it. The customer service team never responded to my emails about a refund. Frustrating to set up an account just to be ignored.

title: Good for damaged hair
text: After 6 weeks of weekly use my ends feel less brittle. Great for color-treated hair. Holds up against the dry winter air.

title: Way too expensive
text: Pretty but overpriced. Not worth the price for what is essentially a tinted chapstick. Better than Brand AcmeLip but only barely. Would not buy again.

title: Skin burned
text: This burned my skin within minutes. Dangerous formula, please be careful. I would consider this a safety hazard for anyone with sensitive skin.

title: Best beard oil
text: Game changer. Used every day for months and my beard finally feels soft. I use this for the morning routine and the scent is subtle.

title: Confusing directions
text: The instructions are unclear about how long to leave it in. Hard to figure out from the packaging. Product itself is fine but the manual is terrible.

title: Replaced my Sephora routine
text: Replaced my Sephora Brand X serum with this. Skin is glowing after months of use. Worth every penny.

title: Bottle cracked
text: Bottle cracked the second time I dropped it. The packaging feels cheap and flimsy. Returned for a refund.

title: Works after consistent use
text: After 8 weeks of nightly use my acne is noticeably better. Great for people who can be patient with skincare.
